title: Chewy Herbal Algerian Sirloin Steak Tips Wrap
description: A refreshing Algerian-inspired dish featuring chewy sirloin steak tips wrapped in a corn husk and infused with herbal flavors.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the sirloin steak tips with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Grill the sirloin steak tips for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, prepare the corn husks by brushing them with olive oil and grilling them for 1-2 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Once the steak tips are cooked, let them rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing them into thin strips.
In a small bowl, mix together the mint leaves, parsley leaves, lemon juice, and honey.
To assemble the wraps, place a few slices of the grilled sirloin steak tips onto the center of a grilled corn husk, then top with the herbal mixture.
Fold the bottom edge of the corn husk up over the filling, and then fold in the sides before rolling the wrap up tightly.
